infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to capture photos for hunts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app accesses your photo library to save and share hunt photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to show nearby hunts and track your progress.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app uses your location in the background to notify you of nearby hunts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app uses your location in the background to notify you of nearby hunts.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Bumbee to use your location to show nearby hunts.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Bumbee to use your location in the background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Bumbee to use your location to show nearby hunts.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Bumbee to access your camera to capture hunt photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Bumbee to access your photos to save hunt memories.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Bumbee to save photos to your library.
